steps.title: Choose two line points
steps.content: Use two readable points on the line of best fit, approximately $(0,12)$ and $(10,1)$. These are points on the line, not necessarily data points.

steps.title: Compute the slope
steps.content:
Apply rise over run. The line drops $11$ units while moving $10$ units to the right, so the slope is negative.
$$m=\frac{1-12}{10-0}=\frac{-11}{10}=-1.1$$
The answer is B.
